key_relation: v_c ∝ r^(1 - alpha/2) for halo rho∝r^-alpha; flat needs alpha=2 (isothermal)
phase8_saturation_halo_claim_corrected: GR (r^-1.5) tail gives RISING r^1/4, not flat; flat needs isothermal r^-2
door1_requirements: capacity rule transitions alpha 1.5->2 at scale a0 (=RAR/MOND)
verdict: DOES A CAPACITY RULE GIVE FLAT ROTATION CURVES (door #1)? The rotation curve exponent is v_c ∝ r^(1-alpha/2) for a halo rho∝r^-alpha. Measured large-r slopes: visible-only (exponential disk) = -0.5 (falling = the dark-matter problem, Keplerian); n=3 GR-capacity halo (alpha=1.5) = 0.25 (rising, ~r^1/4); isothermal halo (alpha=2.0) = -0.0 (FLAT). CORRECTION TO PHASE-8: the GR-matching capacity rule (n=3, rho∝r^-3/2) does NOT give flat curves — it gives a slowly RISING r^1/4 curve (n3_not_flat=True). Phase-8's 'saturating capacity -> cored centre + GR tail -> dark-matter halo' CONFLATED 'cored' with 'isothermal': a cored centre + r^-3/2 tail is NOT a flat-curve (r^-2) halo. The honest requirement for door #1: FLAT curves need rho ∝ 1/r^2 (isothermal, alpha=2; flat=True) at galactic scale — a DIFFERENT exponent than the n=3 GR rule. So a single capacity rule must TRANSITION: rho∝r^-3/2 (GR) near matter / high acceleration, to rho∝r^-2 (flat curves) at large r / low acceleration. The transition acceleration IS the MOND a0 / the RAR (bet B2). TWO further requirements door #1 makes explicit: (i) intent must SELF-GRAVITATE (the flowing intent halo is itself a source), or only visible matter gravitates and curves stay Keplerian; (ii) the capacity rule must produce the alpha:1.5->2 transition at the right scale. NEITHER is yet shown — so door #1 is OPEN, now precisely scoped: it is not 'saturation = halo' (that was wrong) but 'a transitioning capacity rule that yields an isothermal intent-halo at low acceleration, with transition scale a0'. Per dp: a0 being a FIT constant is fine (most constants are) — the test is whether the transition + a0 reproduce the RAR across SPARC (the actual B2 test, next). NOT novel physics yet; Bucket 0 unchanged. This phase's value: a real CORRECTION (Phase-8 overclaim) + door #1 scoped to a falsifiable target.
